questions.q: In late April 2026, which AI coding agent, running Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.6, was blamed for accidentally deleting PocketOS's entire production database in just 9 seconds?
Announced in late April 2026 by original developers zsKnight and _Demo_, 'Super ZSNES' is a modern rewrite of the classic SNES emulator that notably leverages what to enhance graphics?

In late April 2026, tech giants including Apple and Google successfully waged a multi-million dollar lobbying campaign to crush which California bill that would have prohibited them from favoring their own products over smaller rivals?
options: The Innovation and Choice Online Act

questions.q: In late April 2026, over 600 Google employees signed a letter asking CEO Sundar Pichai to block the company's AI models from being used for classified purposes by which organization?
